title: Data dictionary + usage/citation + "not medical advice" guide
context: Documentation makes the graph correctly reusable and citable and makes the not-advice framing unmissable for downstream users. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Write the data dictionary plus a usage/citation guide and a prominent 'not medical advice' guide for the published graph.
acceptanceCriteria: Data dictionary documents every class, property, and the provenance/evidence-level fields.
Usage/citation guide explains how to cite the graph and its source-version manifest.
A prominent 'not medical advice' guide states the research-evidence framing.
output: Data dictionary + usage/citation + not-advice guide (docs/), committed via PR.
